narrative:
Harrison Township has 2,721 registered voters, with 59.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.3%, a clear Republican lean of 7.5 percentage points.
